description_long: This kiosk is a compact, free-standing promotional display unit for Protex Icy Cool, designed primarily for retail or urban sidewalk environments. The structure is made of printed cardboard or lightweight board, featuring a vertical back panel with vibrant blue and white graphics, including water splash imagery and product branding. The front face prominently displays the Protex logo and product imagery, with a lower shelf area that holds several product containers, partially visible through the open front. The side panels are also printed with product graphics and text, reinforcing the brand and freshness theme. The rear of the kiosk is plain and unadorned, while the overall form is sleek, with a slight forward curve to the display area. The kiosk is lightweight, portable, and intended for temporary placement in high-traffic areas.
description: A compact, branded Protex Icy Cool promotional kiosk with vivid blue and white graphics, open front shelving, and a sleek, curved display design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main Protex branding, product imagery, and open shelf area with visible product containers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the curved side panel with printed product graphics and text, and partial view of the shelf.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, unprinted surface with no graphics or openings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with product graphics and text, and partial view of the open shelf.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign and logo, integrated into the structure on the front, side panels, and header; visible text includes 'Protex', 'ICY COOL', and 'Extrema y Duradera Frescura'.
attribute_roof_design: Flat, vertical back panel extending above the shelf, made of printed cardboard with no overhang or decorative elements.
